normalized_title: City of Fremantle Local Planning Policy 2.14 - Advertisements and Signs
scope_summary: Sets requirements for advertisements and signage requiring planning approval under Local Planning Scheme No. 4, applying to all land zoned and reserved under the Scheme (and as guidance elsewhere). Part 1 contains general provisions (no signs on primarily residential properties unless tied to a home business, no hazardous distraction, no third-party advertising); Part 2 sets dimensional and quantity controls for specific sign types; Part 3 adds protections for heritage-protected places.

key_numeric_standards.unit: signs per street frontage per tenancy
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: awning fascia or verandah fascia signs
